channel.title: Redmi Note 15 4G MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Redmi Note 15 4G MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.1.0.WPGTRXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 15 4G Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 4G Turkey

Codename: spinel

Version: OS3.0.1.0.WPGTRXM | 16.0

Size: 8.4 GB

MD5: 3087e7f414c56549ec6645c41420c466

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to April 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.1.0.WPGTRXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 15 4G Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 4G Turkey

Codename: spinel

Version: OS3.0.1.0.WPGTRXM | 16.0

Size: 5.9 GB

MD5: d19ee8bb404d89a32845c6261fd1b410

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to April 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WPGMIXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 15 4G Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 4G Global

Codename: spinel

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WPGMIXM | 16.0

Size: 9.9 GB

MD5: 77d160a6fef10e727210a876c6d685b5

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.2.0.WPGTWXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 15 4G Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Updated the security patch to May 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here

Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

[Interconnectivity]

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.202.0.VPGTWXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 15 4G Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 4G Taiwan

Codename: spinel

Version: OS2.0.202.0.VPGTWXM | 15.0

Size: 4.7 GB

MD5: 5807a12c9813b5e9ed1062ed0a595292

Changelog:
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Tweaked the Storage refresh algorithm so it activates more often
[System animations]
Optimization: Interrupt animation when entering subpages within apps
Optimization: Interrupt animation during app transitions
Optimization: Interrupt animation when closing apps in Landscape mode
[System]
New: Home screen wallpaper now supports a blur effect
Optimization: Updated styles for some classic pages
[Lock screen]
New: Eastern aesthetics lock screen templates
New: Customizable Lock screen shortcuts
[Settings]
Optimization: Added a shortcut to system navigation settings in Home screen settings
[Status bar, Notification shade]
New: Some status bar icons now support custom display

Download: Here
